title: Philippine Government Offices for OFWs in Hong Kong

emergency_numbers.note: If you are in danger, being abused, or need urgent help:

offices.name: Philippine Consulate General (PCG)
offices.address: 14/F United Centre, 95 Queensway, Admiralty, Hong Kong
offices.for: Passport, civil documents, authentication, emergency assistance

offices.name: Assistance to Nationals (ATN) Section
offices.address: 14/F United Centre, 95 Queensway, Admiralty, Hong Kong

offices.name: Migrant Workers Office (MWO)
offices.address: Office No. 2, 29/F United Centre, 95 Queensway, Admiralty, Hong Kong
offices.for: OEC, employment contracts, labor disputes, repatriation, counselling

offices.name: Overseas Workers Welfare Administration (OWWA)
offices.address: Office No. 2, 29/F United Centre, 95 Queensway, Admiralty, Hong Kong
offices.for: OWWA membership, welfare assistance, shelter, training, financial aid
